app.name: Forge
app.in_flow: You are in flow right now.
app.protect_flow: Protect this. Don't break the rhythm.
app.streak_at_risk: Your {{streak}}-day streak on {{track}} is at risk.
app.check_in_today: Check in today. I know you can do this.
app.best_world: You're among the best in the world.
motivations: Today is a clean page. Write one good line.
You're closer than you were yesterday.
Make one move that future-you applauds.
Discipline is self-love in slow motion.
celebration_phrases: The version of you who quit is getting further away.
You showed up. That's the whole game.
Discipline is just self-love spelled differently.
Another rep. Another brick. Another day.
The streak doesn't care how you feel. It cares that you came.
Most people talked about it. You did it.
One day you'll look back — this is when it started.
Your future self just exhaled.
Identity is built in moments like this one.
The hard days count double.
You're not building a habit. You're building a person.
Small reps. Big identity.
Every check-in is a vote for who you're becoming.
Consistency isn't glamorous. Neither is greatness — until it is.
This is what the comeback looks like.
No one can take today away from you.
The gap between who you are and who you want to be just got smaller.
Showing up when you don't want to — that's the real flex.
You didn't need motivation. You used discipline. That's stronger.
Day by day. That's how empires are built.
reentry_messages: You're back. That's all that matters.
The gap doesn't define the path. You're here now.
The best ones don't give up — they restart. Let's begin again.
Every great story has a chapter where the main character comes back. This is yours.

common.privacy_coach: This stays between you and your coach. Always.
common.monthly_limit_body: Free plan includes {{limit}} messages/month. Your messages reset on the 1st.
common.install_desc: Install Forge for the best experience.
common.error_retry: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

home.no_paths_body: Pick your first track and your AI coach will build a personalized journey for you.
home.missed_streak: Missed a day and lost your streak? Click here
home.no_problem: No problem — start again whenever you're ready.
home.final_stage_body: Congratulations! Want to receive your prize at home?
home.island_waiting: Your island is waiting at day {{day}}
home.vacation_body: Traveling or need a break? Pause your streak — it won't reset.
home.feedback_body: If you had trouble opening the app, tell us what happened. It helps us improve.
home.feedback_placeholder: e.g. no connection, app wouldn't open...
home.feedback_sent_body: We'll take your feedback into account.
home.feedback_privacy: Sent privately to the Forge team.
home.prize_body: You've reached the final stage. Enter your address below and we'll ship you a personalised prize for just €7.99.
home.prize_on_list_body: We'll send your personalised prize to the address you provided.

journey.drives_placeholder: e.g. "I want to feel calmer and less reactive in daily life"
journey.obstacle_placeholder: e.g. "I always quit after a few days when things get hard"
journey.meet_coach: Meet {{name}} — here for every day of this journey.
journey.days_generated_later: Days {{from}}–{{to}} will be generated as you progress.
journey.task_question: Did you do the task? How did it go?
journey.task_placeholder: Describe what you actually did today…
journey.reflection_placeholder: What did you notice about yourself today?
journey.fill_first_body: Write down what you did and your reflection — then you're ready to check in.
journey.milestone_body: You've hit a major milestone on your {{track}} journey. This is the moment most people quit — and you didn't.
journey.restart_confirm: Restart this journey? Your streak and progress will be reset.
journey.life_happens: Life happens — no judgment here. Want me to reshape the upcoming days around where you are now, or keep your original plan?
journey.felt_urge_today: Did you experience any urges today?
journey.fill_first_sub: Write down what you did and your reflection — then you're ready to check in.

journey.describe_task_placeholder: Describe what you actually did today…
journey.days_will_generate: Days {{from}}–{{to}} will be generated as you progress.
journey.coach_limit_sub: Free plan includes {{n}} messages/month. Your messages reset on the 1st.
journey.coach_privacy: This stays between you and your coach. Always.
journey.adapt_intro: Life happens — no judgment here. Want me to reshape the upcoming days around where you are now, or keep your original plan?
journey.milestone_message: You've hit a major milestone on your {{name}} journey. This is the moment most people quit — and you didn't.

checkin.title: Day {{day}} check-in
checkin.urge_question: Did you experience any urges today?

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Your data, clear and honest.
insights.no_data: Check in daily to unlock your patterns.
insights.empty_body: Your first check-in unlocks your insights. Every pattern, streak, and milestone starts with one honest day.
insights.empty_waiting: Your coach is waiting to see what you're made of.
insights.first_checkin_prompt: Complete your first check-in to see activity here.
insights.empty_desc: Your first check-in unlocks your insights. Every pattern, streak, and milestone starts with one honest day.
insights.coach_waiting: Your coach is waiting to see what you're made of.
insights.no_activity_yet: Complete your first check-in to see activity here.

coach.nudge_inactivity: You've been away for a few days. Every step counts — even a small one.
coach.nudge_high_urge: Tough day with urges. That awareness itself is strength.
coach.nudge_low_mood: Your mood has been lower lately. You don't have to feel great to make progress.
coach.nudge_streak_broken: Streaks break. What matters is that you're still here.

milestones.10_days: You've built a real habit. 10 days of choosing yourself.
milestones.30_days: One month in. This is who you are now.
milestones.share_text: I've reached {{days}} days on my {{track}} journey with Forge!
milestones.congrats_body: You've hit {{days}} days. Want to share this moment?

accountability.title: Accountability Partner
accountability.privacy_note: Your partner only sees what you choose to share.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account and preferences.
settings.reminder_body: Get a nudge when you have not checked in yet.
settings.reminder_active: You will get a daily nudge if you have not checked in.
settings.shields_body: Earn a shield every 10 consecutive days. Auto-used if you miss a day.
settings.data_body: Your progress is saved locally and backed up to your account. You can export or delete your data at any time.
settings.clear_local_body: Remove all locally cached data and sign out
settings.push_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.push_denied: Permission denied. Enable notifications in browser settings.
settings.push_failed: Could not enable notifications. Try again.

gdpr.export_desc: Download all data we hold about you as a JSON file.
gdpr.delete_desc: This permanently deletes your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

sos.brain_body: Urges peak at 15–20 minutes, then naturally subside. Your prefrontal cortex — the part that makes decisions — is temporarily overwhelmed. It will come back online.
sos.do_one: Do one of these right now:
sos.two_cycles: 2 full cycles — then we ground you
sos.brain_science: Urges peak at 15–20 minutes, then naturally subside. Your prefrontal cortex — the part that makes decisions — is temporarily overwhelmed. It will come back online.
sos.do_one_now: Do one of these right now:

overlays.showed_up: That's still {{days}} days you showed up.
overlays.streak_note: Streaks measure consistency — not worth. Missing one day doesn't erase what you built.
overlays.shields_body: Forge gives you 1 Shield every 14 days of consistent use — automatically spent when you miss a day. Keep going to earn the next one.
overlays.still_n_days: That's still {{n}} days you showed up.
overlays.streak_not_worth: Streaks measure consistency — not worth. Missing one day doesn't erase what you built.
overlays.shields_desc: Forge gives you 1 Shield every 14 days of consistent use — automatically spent when you miss a day. Keep going to earn the next one.
